Tooltip

Rich tooltip component using <lyte-tooltip> Slyte DOM. Supports Text, List, and Table content types across 4 placements (top, bottom, left, right).

Floating Figma Synced 3 Types × 4 Placements
Text Tooltip — Short
Short Text
Save changes
HTML
<div class="zc-tooltip zc-tooltip-bottom">
  <div class="zc-tooltip-arrow"></div>
  <div class="zc-tooltip-content">Save changes</div>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-tooltip {
  background: #182649;
  border-radius: var(--zc-radius-r, 6px);
  padding: 8px 12px;
  font-size: var(--zc-p3-font-size, 12px);
  color: #FFFFFF;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
}
Text Tooltip — Long
Long Text
This tooltip contains a longer description that wraps across multiple lines within the max-width constraint.
HTML
<div class="zc-tooltip zc-tooltip-bottom">
  <div class="zc-tooltip-arrow"></div>
  <div class="zc-tooltip-content">
    This tooltip contains a longer description that
    wraps across multiple lines within the max-width constraint.
  </div>
</div>
List Tooltip — With Title
Title + List
Keyboard Shortcuts
  • Ctrl + S to save
  • Ctrl + Z to undo
  • Ctrl + D to duplicate
HTML
<div class="zc-tooltip zc-tooltip-bottom">
  <div class="zc-tooltip-arrow"></div>
  <div class="zc-tooltip-content">
    <div class="zc-tooltip-title">Keyboard Shortcuts</div>
    <ul class="zc-tooltip-list">
      <li>Ctrl + S to save</li>
      <li>Ctrl + Z to undo</li>
      <li>Ctrl + D to duplicate</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-tooltip-title {
  font-weight: var(--zc-p2-font-weight-semibold, 600);
  font-size: var(--zc-p3-font-size, 12px);
  margin-bottom: 4px;
  color: #FFFFFF;
}
.zc-tooltip-list {
  list-style: disc;
  margin: 0;
  padding-left: 16px;
}
.zc-tooltip-list li {
  padding: 2px 0;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
}
List Tooltip — No Title
List Only
  • Option A
  • Option B
  • Option C
HTML
<div class="zc-tooltip zc-tooltip-bottom">
  <div class="zc-tooltip-arrow"></div>
  <div class="zc-tooltip-content">
    <ul class="zc-tooltip-list">
      <li>Option A</li>
      <li>Option B</li>
      <li>Option C</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</div>
Table Tooltip — Key-Value Pairs
With Title
Details
NameJohn Doe
RoleDeveloper
TeamFrontend
HTML
<div class="zc-tooltip zc-tooltip-bottom">
  <div class="zc-tooltip-arrow"></div>
  <div class="zc-tooltip-content">
    <div class="zc-tooltip-title">Details</div>
    <table class="zc-tooltip-table">
      <tr>
        <td class="zc-tooltip-key">Name</td>
        <td class="zc-tooltip-val">John Doe</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="zc-tooltip-key">Role</td>
        <td class="zc-tooltip-val">Developer</td>
      </tr>
    </table>
  </div>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-tooltip-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
}
.zc-tooltip-table td {
  padding: 2px 0;
  font-size: 12px;
  vertical-align: top;
}
.zc-tooltip-key {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
  padding-right: 12px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.zc-tooltip-val {
  color: #FFFFFF;
}
Table Tooltip — No Title
No Title
StatusActive
Created8 Mar 2026
PriorityHigh
HTML
<div class="zc-tooltip zc-tooltip-bottom">
  <div class="zc-tooltip-arrow"></div>
  <div class="zc-tooltip-content">
    <table class="zc-tooltip-table">
      <tr>
        <td class="zc-tooltip-key">Status</td>
        <td class="zc-tooltip-val">Active</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="zc-tooltip-key">Created</td>
        <td class="zc-tooltip-val">8 Mar 2026</td>
      </tr>
    </table>
  </div>
</div>
Placement — Top
Top
Tooltip on top
HTML
<div class="zc-tooltip zc-tooltip-top">
  <div class="zc-tooltip-arrow"></div>
  <div class="zc-tooltip-content">Tooltip on top</div>
</div>
Placement — Bottom
Bottom
Tooltip on bottom
HTML
<div class="zc-tooltip zc-tooltip-bottom">
  <div class="zc-tooltip-arrow"></div>
  <div class="zc-tooltip-content">Tooltip on bottom</div>
</div>
Placement — Left
Left
Tooltip on left
HTML
<div class="zc-tooltip zc-tooltip-left">
  <div class="zc-tooltip-arrow"></div>
  <div class="zc-tooltip-content">Tooltip on left</div>
</div>
Placement — Right
Right
Tooltip on right
HTML
<div class="zc-tooltip zc-tooltip-right">
  <div class="zc-tooltip-arrow"></div>
  <div class="zc-tooltip-content">Tooltip on right</div>
</div>
Placement — All Positions (List Tooltip)
Top
  • Item A
  • Item B
Bottom
  • Item A
  • Item B
Left
  • Item A
  • Item B
Right
  • Item A
  • Item B
HTML
<!-- Top -->
<div class="zc-tooltip zc-tooltip-top">...</div>

<!-- Bottom -->
<div class="zc-tooltip zc-tooltip-bottom">...</div>

<!-- Left -->
<div class="zc-tooltip zc-tooltip-left">...</div>

<!-- Right -->
<div class="zc-tooltip zc-tooltip-right">...</div>
SCSS
.zc-tooltip-top .zc-tooltip-arrow {
  bottom: -3px; left: 50%; margin-left: -3px;
}
.zc-tooltip-bottom .zc-tooltip-arrow {
  top: -3px; left: 50%; margin-left: -3px;
}
.zc-tooltip-left .zc-tooltip-arrow {
  right: -3px; top: 50%; margin-top: -3px;
}
.zc-tooltip-right .zc-tooltip-arrow {
  left: -3px; top: 50%; margin-top: -3px;
}
